/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libllama-cli-impl.so -o ../../bin/libllama-cli-impl.so "CMakeFiles/llama-cli-impl.dir/cli.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/home/iptv-infra/workspace/llamacpp-aos-benchmark/build-host/bin: ../server/libserver-context.a ../../bin/libllama-common.so.0.0.9793 ../../common/libllama-common-base.a ../../bin/libmtmd.so.0.0.9793 ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9793 ../../bin/libggml.so.0.15.2 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.15.2 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.15.2
